message:
feat: Align DataFrame APIs between CLI and browser

CLI (Zig):
- Add toSQL() method for SQL generation from DataFrame operations
- Supports SELECT, DISTINCT, FROM, JOIN, GROUP BY, ORDER BY, LIMIT, OFFSET

Browser (JS):
- Add orderBy(colIdx, descending) method
- Add offset(n) method
- Add distinct() method
- Add groupBy(...cols) returning GroupedFrame
- Add GroupedFrame class with count/sum/avg/min/max methods
- Update toSQL() to include all new clauses
- Refactor with _clone() helper for immutability

Both now generate compatible SQL from their respective DataFrame operations.
